perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white ruffle top and a denim mini skirt, dances playfully in front of a grey Tesla at an EVOASIS charging station. (2) The scene shifts to her standing against a blue pillar, gesturing excitedly towards the camera and the surrounding charging facilities. (3) She walks on a sidewalk towards a 'LOUISA COFFEE' and a '7-ELEVEN', holding a red cup. (4) Close-up shots of her plugging the charging cable into the Tesla, followed by shots of a digital screen showing charging status and payment information. (5) She concludes by posing and waving near a large blue 'EVOASIS' pylon.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic dance music starts immediately with no vocals. (2) A female voice enters with an energetic, high-pitched tone, speaking rapidly over the background music. (3) The vocal narration continues as the background music maintains a consistent, rhythmic beat. (4) Subtle sound effects of a screen being tapped or a car door closing might be heard but are largely masked by the dominant music and narration. (5) The music fades out slightly as the narration ends with a final call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '當你女友來幫你充電' - Hook text, playful and relatable. (2) 'EVOASIS 最新超級綠洲 開站啦!' - Functional text, announcing a new station opening. (3) '內湖開站 是新站點' - Functional text, specifying the location as Neihu. (4) '拿杯咖啡上個廁所' - Functional text, highlighting nearby amenities. (5) '這站的電價一直只要 6.5 元!' - Functional text, emphasizing a promotional price point.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro dance hook -> Location and facility reveal -> Practical usage demo -> Cost benefit explanation -> Final CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator is present throughout the video; some distant passers-by are blurred in the background of street shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian female with long brown wavy hair, wearing a white off-the-shoulder ruffle top, a denim mini skirt, white socks, and blue sneakers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary setting is a modern EV charging station under a canopy with 'EVOASIS' branding. The background includes urban buildings, a Tesla car, a Louisa Coffee shop, and a 7-Eleven convenience store.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional vlog designed to introduce the new EVOASIS charging station in Neihu, Taipei. It aims to showcase the convenience of the location (near coffee shops and convenience stores), the high charging speed (360kW), and the competitive pricing to attract EV owners.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to explaining the features and benefits of using the EVOASIS charging station, with clear brand logos and a verbal recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Starts with a 'girlfriend' role-play hook and playful dancing to grab attention.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'KOL recommendation' format, blending lifestyle content (vlogging) with a direct product/service pitch. The fast pacing and high text density are characteristic of short-form social media trends.
